presets.name: Simple Up 1/8
presets.description: Straight ascending 1/8 note arp over one octave.

presets.name: Simple Down 1/16
presets.description: Descending 1/16 note arp for bass lines.

presets.name: Up Down Inclusive
presets.description: Up-down with repeated top and bottom notes.

presets.name: As Played
presets.description: Steps through notes in the order they were pressed.

presets.name: Latched Up
presets.description: Ascending with latch for hands-free runs.

presets.name: Staccato Ascent
presets.description: Short clipped gates for a plucky character.

presets.name: Dynamic Ascent
presets.description: Uses source velocity for natural expression.

presets.name: Swung Eights
presets.description: Classic 1/8 arp with a gentle swing.

presets.name: Razor Gate
presets.description: Sharp 1/32 chord gate with alternating pattern.

presets.name: Dense Sparse
presets.description: FAFA bursts with holes for drama.

presets.name: Gate of Thirds
presets.description: Every third step fires a chord.

presets.name: Euphoric Gate
presets.description: Classic 8-step trance lift with two-octave spread.

presets.name: Trance Driver
presets.description: Pounding chord stab on every step.

presets.name: Pulser
presets.description: Eighth-note pulsed chord with subtle swing.

presets.name: Sidechain Chord
presets.description: Chord stabs with pumping hole on downbeats.

presets.name: Chord Skip
presets.description: Long lead-in followed by tight stabs.

presets.name: Anthem Gate
presets.description: Progressive trance chord gate with octave lift.

presets.name: 303 Classic
presets.description: Up 1/16 two-octave arp in minor pentatonic.

presets.name: 303 Saturday
presets.description: Played-order acid workout in blues scale.

presets.name: Squelch
presets.description: Staccato 1/16 minor pent arp with accents.

presets.name: Chemical Brother
presets.description: Driving acid line in A minor pent.

presets.name: Blues Stomp
presets.description: Blues scale acid with accent pattern.

presets.name: Pumped 303
presets.description: Every step repeats twice for drive.

presets.name: Accent Storm
presets.description: Every fourth step accents at max.

presets.name: Desert Acid
presets.description: Phrygian dominant acid for Eastern flavor.

presets.name: Acid with Holes
presets.description: Acid line with rhythmic gaps in stepMask.

presets.name: Mono Groove
presets.description: Played order minor pent with swing groove.

presets.name: House Drive
presets.description: Simple 1/8 house arp with octave jumps.

presets.name: Stair Climb
presets.description: Stair pattern walking up the chord.

presets.name: Staircase Fast
presets.description: Stair pattern fast 1/16 with octave jumps.

presets.name: Disco Ladder
presets.description: Disco 1/8 ladder with some legato feel.

presets.name: Jack Pattern
presets.description: Stair pattern with gated holes every 4.

presets.name: Afterhours
presets.description: Slow dubby 1/8 house at lower octave.

presets.name: Slow Drift
presets.description: Slow 1/4 ambient arp over wide range.

presets.name: Half Dreams
presets.description: Dotted half notes for glacial pace.

presets.name: Blade Runner Mist
presets.description: Spacious sparse arp with Dorian melancholy.

presets.name: Glacial
presets.description: Whole notes arp for massive space.

presets.name: Eno Oblique
presets.description: Very slow random with long gate.

presets.name: Stutter
presets.description: High repeat count for stuttering groove.

presets.name: Aphex Twin
presets.description: Chaotic random walk with dense mask.

presets.name: Cloud Buffer
presets.description: Slow random walk with long gate.

presets.name: Every Beat
presets.description: Chord hits only on strong beats (0x1111).

presets.name: Upbeat Chord
presets.description: Chord on final sixteenth of each beat.

presets.name: Half Sparse
presets.description: Chord stabs only in first half.

presets.name: Bossa Chord
presets.description: Bossa nova chord pattern with swing.

presets.name: Bach's Ornament
presets.description: Ascending group of 3 in C major.

presets.name: Retro Pulse
presets.description: Classic repeated arp with octave up.

presets.name: Night Drive
presets.description: Up 1/16 over two octaves flat vel.

presets.name: Forest Psy
presets.description: Dark forest psy pattern with offbeats.

presets.name: Crab Walk
presets.description: Crab walk with whole tone scale.

presets.name: Spiral
presets.description: Spiral pattern with swing for motion.

presets.name: Sinus Wave
presets.description: Up-down over 4 octaves for sine motion.

presets.name: Scatter Swarm
presets.description: Scatters arp notes across 4 MPE channels.

presets.name: PerNote Rainfall
presets.description: Each held note spawns its own arp line.

presets.name: PerNote Pulse
presets.description: Each note triggers its own 1/16 pulse.

presets.name: Scatter Jazz
presets.description: Swung jazz lines scattered across MPE channels.

presets.name: PerNote Staircase
presets.description: Stair-climbing per-note pattern with octave spread.
